things.name: Canton Tower
things.description: 468m TV tower with a helium balloon and sky drop - Guangzhou's futuristic icon

things.name: Chen Clan Ancestral Hall
things.description: 1894 showpiece of Lingnan architecture with exquisite porcelain, wood and stone carving

things.name: Shamian Island
things.description: Former colonial island with French and British villas, banyan trees and riverside cafes

things.name: Yuexiu Park & Nanyue King Museum
things.description: City park with the 5 Ram Statue and the tomb of the 2,000-year-old Nanyue Kingdom

things.name: Dim Sum at Guangzhou Restaurant
things.description: Authentic Cantonese dim sum at the most famous restaurant in the home of yum cha

things.name: Temple of the Six Banyan Trees
things.description: 1,500-year-old Buddhist temple with a spectacular Flower Pagoda

things.name: Guangzhou Opera House
things.description: Zaha Hadid's twin-pebble design on the Pearl River waterfront

things.name: Liwan Lake Park & Xiguan Houses
things.description: Traditional 19th-century Xiguan merchant mansions with moon doors and Qilou shophouses

things.name: Baiyun Mountain Scenic Area
things.description: Series of peaks with hiking trails, cable car and the Ming-dynasty Moxing Ridge

things.name: Zhenhai Tower (Museum of Guangzhou)
things.description: Ming-dynasty tower with five floors of Guangzhou history and city views
